title: Green Thumb Industries Inc (GTBIF) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript Highlights
text: Green Thumb Industries' Q2 2024 earnings call highlighted strong revenue growth and strategic expansion plans. The company reported Q2 2024 revenue of $280 million, up 11% year-over-year, demonstrating acceleration from earlier in the year. Earnings per share of 9 cents significantly exceeded analyst expectations of 5 cents. Adjusted EBITDA exceeded $90 million, with margins stable at over 33% of revenue. Management discussed plans for store expansion, with 3 new stores opened through June and 7-8 more expected by year-end. The company's CPG revenue grew over 15% compared to Q2 last year, driven by market share gains in Ohio, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and New York. The company also repurchased 1.6 million shares for approximately $20 million, demonstrating confidence in intrinsic value. Cash position remained strong at $196 million at quarter end. Management emphasized the company's ability to generate positive cash flow while investing in growth. The company's portfolio of brands continues to gain market share in established markets.
